posts.author: emichel158 (E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Make “duplicate group” automations also carry over item updates, mirroring the manual “duplicate group” functionality.

What are you trying to achieve

So that if we duplicate a group every day using an automation, we don’t have to copy the updates for each item over or have to manually use the “duplicate with updates” button and move duplicate group to top.
